description: Triggers your automation automatically on a recurring schedule (e.g., every hour, daily, weekly).

setupGuide.title: Setting up Scheduled Timers
setupGuide.summary: Choose how often you want this workflow to run automatically.
steps: Select a schedule frequency (every minute, every hour, daily at a set time, or weekly).
No 3rd-party configuration needed—n8n manages the background timer automatically!

requiredFields.label: Frequency
requiredFields.description: How often the workflow should trigger
